sections.paragraph: a root of uncertain signification, to which I should attribute the sense of cooking, baking, as being related to the Persic جختن, ينحتن backen (n being inserted in the middle of a biliteral root, compare כָּנַף); some traces of this stock are also to be found in the Phœnicio-Shemitic languages, see p. 185 . Hence-
